_publications._publicationTitle: Early Detection of Malignant and Premalignant Peripheral Nerve Tumors Using Cell-Free DNA Fragmentomics.

_contextSnippet: In MPNST samples, tumor fractions in plasma measured by ichorCNA correlated strongly with the NMF-inferred malignant signature weight (r = 0.6; P = 0.002)
details: Tumor fractions in MPNST samples correlated strongly with NMF-inferred malignant signature weight (r = 0.6; P = 0.002)
